TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Petr_Pavel, title = Petr_Pavel, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Petr_Pavel} }

S.FORM: Petr Pavel ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 11, Petr Pavel, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Czechia ta' misuw hya' ga Petr Pavel, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2023 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Petr Pavel minkahul sa Chongqing, Planá na Czechoslovakia. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1961 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Petr Pavel ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 11, Petr Pavel, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Czechia ta' misuw hya' ga Petr Pavel, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2023 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Petr Pavel minkahul sa Chongqing, Planá na Czechoslovakia. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1961 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: petr pa*el rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, petr pa*el, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨzeʦ~ʨħia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa petr pa*el, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral petr pa*el minkaħul s~ɕa ʦ~ʨħoŋqiŋ, plan* na ʦ~ʨzeʦ~ʨħos~ɕlo*akia. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
